race.comment: ARGYLE STAR (1) stuck on well over the 1850m at Dongara to win the Cup and should be better again stepping out in distance. She's found form now and gets Pike back in the saddle who has partnered her to victory previously. Can roll forward and go back-to-back. ROYAL TROOPER (2) sat handy at Pinjarra last start and bolted in over 2000mm winning by 4.3L. Getting out to 2200m is a big tick and Nottle remains in the saddle. Wouldn't surprise to see him repeat the dose. MYZOOM (10) has enough early speed to offset the tricky barrier and was far too good at Belmont over the mile. Now steps right out to 2200m from the mile, but she's a fit horse and looks a leading chance. VIVAROK (3) was too good at Geraldton last start and is worth though from the inside barrier. HARD QUESTIONS (5) won't be far away.
